problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: If Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
